title: She Survived Meta Layoffs. Her Entire Team Didn't
description: In April, Meta employees were told that 8,000 or 10 per cent of the workforce would be laid off in May as the company readied itself for the era of artificial intelligence. Thousands more would be reassigned to AI initiatives.
content:
Will I still have a job next month?

title: driven data centre demand far outstrips supply despite record hyperscaler spending: Jefferies
description: Global demand for data centres continues to significantly outpace available supply, creating a structural shortage that is expected to persist for years as artificial intelligence (AI) adoption accelerates, according to a report by Jefferies.

title: From AI Optimism to Monetary Tightening Concerns: What China’s Market Drop Signals
description: Chinese and Hong Kong equities fell sharply at the start of the week as investors reassessed the sustainability of recent gains driven by artificial intelligence-related stocks. The sell-off was amplified by strong U.S. labor market data, which raised concerns that the Federal Reserve could maintain a tighter monetary policy stance for longer. The episode highlights the growing connection between global interest-rate expectations and technology-sector valuations across major markets.
content: China's stock markets opened the week with significant losses, mirroring weakness across regional markets and extending a broader reassessment of technology-sector valuations. Major benchmarks, including the CSI300 and Shanghai Composite Index, fell ... [7204 chars]
